title: Thappellam Thappae Illai Lyrics Naan Songs Lyrics

Singers: Aathi, Santhosh Hariharan

Movie: Naan
Music: Vijay Antony

Thappellam Thappae illai, Sariellaam sariyae illai
Thappai nee sariyaai seithaal, thappu illai thappu ilai

Open the doors lemme show you something
You gotto call me my name is salim
Everyday that I keep telling
let me go on, let me go strong..

Gaandhiyum .. thapputhaan senji thirundhinal
Move it move it always ..

Thappellam Thappae illai, Sariellaam sariyae illai
Thappai nee sariyaai seithaal, thappu illai thappu ilai

Open the doors lemme show you something
You gotto call me my name is salim
Everyday that I keep telling
let me go on, let me go strong

thooram thalli anji nirpaan
Pavam andha aadugali ulayil vaipaan

NIyayangalai pesum podhu
kholaiena thalli vaipaan
Kaiyil kathi ullavanai thalivan enbaan

Eppodhu poigal nee solvaayo
appodhu ulgail unnai pol? enbaar
Eppodhu unmai nee solvaayo
appodhu unnapol yemaali yaar enbaar

Thappellam Thappae illai, Sariellaam sariyae illai

You gotto call me my name is salim
Everyday that I keep telling
let me go on, let me go strong

Vazhkai oru poraatamthaan
vazhve oru viyabaramthan
Kelae neeyum vilundhuvittaal Pullum sirikum

Pogum dhisai yaavum unnai
poda endru solli solli
Maatrangal naalum unn nenjai kilikum

Boomithaan kaasuku Valaatum
pogalai thaalaatum unmaiku theemootum

Yekkangal indrodu pogattum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a message about overcoming mistakes and embracing positivity, emphasizing that there are no failures if one learns from them.

How does this song fit into the movie plot?

In Naan, this song reflects the protagonist's journey of self-discovery and resilience, showcasing their determination to move forward.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Aathi and Santhosh Hariharan, with music composed by Vijay Antony.

When was the song released?

Thappellam Thappae Illai was released on August 4, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thappellam Thappae Illai, the upbeat rhythm and lively lyrics encapsulate a spirit of resilience and joy. The song serves as a motivational anthem, encouraging listeners to embrace life’s challenges with positivity. Set against the backdrop of Naan, it highlights the protagonist's journey towards self-empowerment. The energetic collaboration between Aathi and Santhosh Hariharan, paired with Vijay Antony's vibrant composition, makes this track a celebration of life and determination.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thappellam Thappae Illai from Naan is a vibrant anthem that perfectly blends the dynamic vocals of Aathi and Santhosh Hariharan. With Vijay Antony's electrifying music, this track is sure to get you moving and grooving. Experience the infectious energy and catchy lyrics that make this song a must-listen for any celebration!
stanzaMeanings: There is no mistake in mistakes, everything is not right. If you do the mistake correctly, then there is no mistake.
Open the doors, let me show you something. You have to call me, my name is Salim. Every day I keep saying, let me go on, let me be strong.
Even if there is a mistake, it can be corrected. Move it, move it always.
There is no mistake in mistakes, everything is not right. If you do the mistake correctly, then there is no mistake.
Open the doors, let me show you something. You have to call me, my name is Salim. Every day I keep saying, let me go on, let me be strong.
In the beginning, there is poison, so they push it away and stand firm. Poor dancer, they will place it in the ground.
When they speak of justice, they push it away. The one with the knife in hand is called a hero.
When will you say the truth? At that time, who will be like you? When will you speak the truth? At that time, who will be like you?
There is no mistake in mistakes, everything is not right. If you do the mistake correctly, then there is no mistake.
Open the doors, let me show you something. You have to call me, my name is Salim. Every day I keep saying, let me go on, let me be strong.
Life is a struggle, living is a challenge. If you fall, you will also rise.
Every direction says to let you go. Changes will always make your heart smile.
The earth will give you wealth, and the truth will bring you peace.
Let the worries go away, let happiness come in, let the troubles fade away.
There is no mistake in mistakes...
